                              472

                              Who constructed mosque Zarrar?

                              Correct Answer: Hypocrites
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              Masjid al-Ḍirār  was a mosque built by hypocrites in Medina 

                              It was later destroyed by the order of Prophet Muhammad (SAAW).

                              This mosque was built by hypocrites in order to cause disunity among the believers, promote hypocrisy and it was a base for disbelievers as well. 

                              473

                              The Holy Prophet (SAW) offered Salah Tarawih in the mosque for _____?

                              Correct Answer: 3 days
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation
                              • The holy prophet (PBUH) offered Salat e Tarawih in the mosque for three days. 
                              • Tarawih  is a Sunnat performed in congregation during Ramadan of the Islamic calendar, after Isha
                              474

                              What was the name of Hazrat Ibrahim's (AS) father?

                              Correct Answer: Azhar
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              Hazrat Ibrahim's (AS) father is commonly known as Azhar

                              His mother is Mahalath. 

                              475

                              Prophet stayed at Makkah for ___ days after its conquest ?

                              Correct Answer: 15
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              فتح مکہ کے بعد رسول اللہ صلی اللہ علیہ وسلم مکہ میں 15 دن رہے

                              The conquest of Mecca by Muslims led by the Islamic prophet Muhammad in , 20 Ramadan, 8 AH.

                              The Messenger of Allah (S.A.W.) entered Makkah on his favorite camel Al-Kaswa

                              Having Usama Ibn Zaid (R.A.) sitting behind him.

                              On his way, he recited Surah Al-Fatha (48th Surah of the Quran)

                              476

                              گھوڑوں پر زکوت کس نے ختم کی؟

                              Correct Answer: حضرت عمر فاروقؓ
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation
                              حضرت عمرؓ بن خطاب نے گھوڑوں سے زکوٰۃ ختم کی اور ان کی بجائے ان پر نقدی کی شکل میں ٹیکس لگایا،
                              جس سے یہ واضح ہو گیا کہ بحیثیت جانور ان پر زکوٰۃ نہیں تھی
                              بلکہ زیادہ قیمت والے مال میں سے صدقہ وصول کیا جاتا تھا.  

                              477

                              عیدالفطر کب فرض ہوئی؟

                              Correct Answer: see the answer
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              عید الفطر 2 ہجری میں فرض ہوئی

                              عید الفطر کا تعلق اسلامی سال کے دسویں مہینے شوال سے ہے

                              478

                              حج کے دوران حاجی میدان عرفہ میں کب جمع ہوتے ہیں؟

                              Correct Answer: see the answer
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              حج کے دوران حاجی میدان عرفہ میں 9 ذوالحجہ کو جمع ہوتے ہیں۔ اس دن کو یوم عرفہ کہا جاتا ہے۔

                              یہ حج کا سب سے اہم دن ہے اور اس دن حاجی اللہ تعالیٰ کے حضور اپنے گناہوں کی مغفرت کے لیے دعا کرتے ہیں۔

                              479

                              What role does the 'Mudaraba' play in the Islamle economic system?

                              Correct Answer: It promotes profit-sharing between investors and entrepreneurs
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              Mudaraba is a partnership profit between the Bank and an enterprise / company for a pre-agreed period.

                              Customers can deposit funds with the Bank

                              They will then be invested in the functioning of economic activity/business that comply with principles of Sharia.

                              480

                              حضرت ام حبیبہ کس صحابی کی بہن تھی؟

                              Correct Answer: حضرت امیر معاویہ
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              Umm-ul-Momineen Bibi Umm-e-Habiba

                              Wife of

                              The Holy Prophet (PBUH)

                              Real Name

                              Ramla

                              Daughter of

                              Abu Sufyan

                              Umm-ul-Momineen

                              Mother of believers

                              481

                              حضرت ابو بکر کی نماز جنازہ کس نے پڑھائی؟

                              Correct Answer: حضرت عمر
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              Umar ibn al-Khaṭṭāb was the second Rashidun caliph.

                               Caliphate on 23 August 634.

                              Umar was a senior companion and father-in-law of the Islamic prophet Muhammad. 

                              Born: 585 AD, Mecca, Saudi Arabia

                              Assassinated: November 3, 644 AD, Medina, Saudi Arabia

                              482

                              The last ruler of Ottoman Empire was _____?

                              Correct Answer: Abdul Majeed II
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              The last ruler of the Ottoman Empire was Abdul Majeed II, also known as Abdulmecid II.

                              He was the 40th Head of the House of Osman and the last Caliph of the Ottoman Caliphate.

                              He reigned from 1922 to 1924, when the Ottoman Empire was dissolved and modern-day Turkey was established.

                              483

                              Which companion of Holy Prophet (ﷺ) includes in the scribe of revelation?

                              Correct Answer: All of these
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              Hazrat Usman (RA), Hazrat Zaid Ibn Thabit (RA), and Hazrat Abdullah Bin Masood (RA) were among the companions who served as scribes.

                              They recorded the revelations of the Holy Prophet (ﷺ).

                              484

                              Which number of verses of surah Baqarah is the longest?

                              Correct Answer: 282
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              AL-BAQARAH (the Cow) has been so named from the story of the Cow occurring in this Surah (vv. 67-73).

                              Al-Baqarah is the second and longest chapter of the Quran.

                              It consists of 286 verses

                              282 verse in chapter Al-Baqara. this verse is the longest verse in the longest chapter of the Quran

                              The 282 verse of Surah Al Baqara is known as 'āyatu d-dayn) 

                              Position: Juzʼ 1–3

                              Classification: Medinan

                              No. of Rukus: 40

                               25,500 letters

                              13 Hazrat Ibrahim (علیہ) is mentioned in Sura Baqarah

                              183 Ayat of Surah Al-Baqarah describes the obligation of soam


                              ND16-3-2023

                              485

                              When Hazrat Umar R.A captured Jerusalem for the first time?

                              Correct Answer: 638 CE
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              Jerusalem is located in Israel.

                              Jerusalem was conquered by Hazrat Umer caliph of Islam

                              Area: 125.1 km²

                              Founded: 3000 BC

                              Population: 874,186 (2016) United Nations

                              Jerusalem is considered by many to be one of the holiest places in the world.

                              Jerusalem largest city in Israel.

                              Jerusalem is a site of major significance for the three largest monotheistic religions:

                              Judaism,

                              Islam,

                              Christianity

                              both Israel and Palestine have claimed Jerusalem as a capital city.

                              Israel captured the West Bank and East Jerusalem in the 1967 Middle East War.

                              486

                              Which book written by The book attributed to Hazrat Ali R.A?

                              Correct Answer: Nehjul Balagha
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              Nahj al-balagha is the best-known collection attributed to Ali ibn Abi Talib 

                              It was compiled by al-Sayyid al-Radi in the late 4th/10th century (finished in 400/1009-10).

                              487

                              Who admired Muslim efforts for save Ahadith?

                              Correct Answer: AJ Springer
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              AJ Springer admired Muslim efforts in preserving the sayings and actions of the Prophet Muhammad (PBUH), recognizing the dedication to safeguarding Ahadith.

                              488

                              Before Islam Friday was called _____?

                              Correct Answer: یوم العروبہ
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              In pre-Islamic Arabia, Friday was known as "Yom al-'Arubah" or "Yawm al-'Arubah", which means "Day of Gathering" or "Day of Assembly".

                              In Islamic tradition, Friday is considered a sacred day of worship.

                              It is known as "Yom al-Jumu'ah" (يوم الجمعة), which means "Day of Assembly" or "Friday".

                              489

                              Which animal was residing with the As'hab e Kahaf?

                              Correct Answer: Dog
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              The word "kahf" means "the cave in the mountain"

                              the sura is named "kahf" because it speaks about the story of the Companions of the Cave

                              Qitmeer is the name of the dog in Surah Kahf.

                              while

                              The cave of Ashab e Kahaf is located in Jordan.

                              Ashab e Kahf slept for 309 years

                              The number of Ashab-e-Kahf was 7

                              The story of Ashab al-Kahf is narrated in the eighteenth chapter of the Quran, called “al-Kahf”  In verses 9-26

                              490

                              Who has narrated the most Hadith in females?

                              Correct Answer: Hazrat Ayesha R.A
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              Hazrat Ayesha (رضہ) was the daughter of Hazrat Abu Baker & Wife Of Hazrat Muhammad (PBUH)

                              Aisha was married to Muhammad in Mecca in 624 CE, after the Battle of Badr.
                              Resting                               place Jannat al-Baqi, Medina

                              Hazrat Ayesha Remained alive 46 years after the demise of Muhammad (PBUH).

                              Siddiqa was the title of Hazrat Ayesha (رضہ) meaning 'the truthful woman, daughter of the truthful man

                              Hazrat Ayesha is also known for narrating 2,210 hadiths


                              "Hazrat Muhammad PBUH Had 11th Wives.

                              1.       HAZRAT KHADEJA,

                              2.       HAZRAT SAUDA

                              3.       HAZRAT AYESHA

                              4.       HAZRAT HAFSA

                              5.       HAZRAT ZAINAB KHUZEMA

                              6.       HAZRAT UMM E SALMA

                              7.       HAZRAT ZAINAB BINT E JAHESH

                              8.       HAZRAT JAVERIA

                              9.       HAZRAT UMM E HABIBA

                              10    HAZRAT SAFIA

                              11.   HAZRAT MEMONA RA 


                              ND29-5-2023

                              491

                              What is the name of wife of Abu Jahal?

                              Correct Answer: Maabad Bint Zirara
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              Abu Jahal's  was commonly known as Abu Hakam (“Father of Wisdom”) among the Quraysh as he was considered a wise man.

                              Abu Jahl was fatally wounded in the Battle of Badr by Mu'adh ibn 'Afrā' and Mu'ādh ibn 'Amr, but was finally killed by Abdullah ibn Masud.

                              492

                              The Words of Allah said by Muhammad PBUH is known as Hadith _____?

                              Correct Answer: Qudasi
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              There are three types of ahadith:

                              1. By word
                              2. By act
                              3. Words of Allah said by Muhammad PBUH
                              493

                              Whose birth year is 150 AH, when Imam Abu Hanifa died?

                              Correct Answer: Imam Shafi
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              Imam Shafii was born in the Gazza in the year 150 AH, the same year that Imam Abu Hanifa died.

                              494

                              According to the Holy Quran, there are ______ recipients of “Zakat”.

                              Correct Answer: 8
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation
                              • There are 8 categories (Masarif) for the distribution of Zakat.
                              • These categories are outlined in Surah Al-Taubah (9:60) of the Quran.

                              These are:

                              1. The poor (Al-Fuqara).
                              2. The needy (Al-Masakin).
                              3. Zakat administrators.
                              4. New Muslims and friends of the Muslim community.
                              5. Slaves and captives.
                              6. The debt-ridden.
                              7. In the cause of God.
                              8. The wayfarer (travelling with few resources).
                              495

                              The last fight against Persian in Hazrat Umar (R.A) _______?

                              Correct Answer: Nihawand
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              The Battle of Nihawand, fought in 642 CE.

                              It was the last major confrontation between the Muslim forces under Hazrat Umar (RA) and the Persian Empire.

                              It resulting in a decisive victory for the Muslims and the decline of the Persian Empire.

                              496

                              Al-Fozul Kabir is written by ____?

                              Correct Answer: Shah Wali Ullah
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              Ø  Real name of Shah Waliullah: Qutubuddin Ahmad Syed.

                               

                              Ø  Shah Waliullah first time in history translated the Holy Quran in Persian Language

                               

                              Ø  Shah Wali Ullah was born in the reign of Aurangzeb,

                               

                              Ø  Shah Waliullah Dehlawi Born in 21 February 1703 Phulat, Mughal Empire

                               

                              Ø  Shah Waliullah Dehlawi Died in 20 August 1762 (aged 59) Dehli, Mughal Empire
                              497

                              Which book wrote by Imam Ghazali?

                              Correct Answer: Ahya Al-Uloom
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              Ahya Al-Uloom (أحياء علوم الدين) is also known as "The Revival of the Religious Sciences".

                              It is a renowned book written by Imam Ghazali (1058-1111 CE).

                              It is a comprehensive encyclopedia of Islamic spirituality, philosophy, and theology, consisting of 40 books.

                              498

                              The word uttered before Namaz is called ____?

                              Correct Answer: Takbeer-e-Tahreema
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              The formula to commence prayer by raising the hands upto the ears and bringing them down saying Al-Laahu Akbar and then put them below the navel is called "Takbeer-e-Tahreema".

                              It means that all other things are now forbidden than the prayer.

                              499

                              Where was the Surah e Baqara revealed?

                              Correct Answer: Madina
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation
                              • Al-Baqarah (The Cow or The Heifer) is the second and longest chapter of the Quran, with 286 verses.
                              • It derives its name from the story of the cow (vv. 67-73).
                              • Al-Baqara is a Madni surah revealed in Madina
                              • Verse 282, the longest verse, is known as 'āyatu d-dayn.
                              • It consists of 25,500 letters and is positioned in Juzʼ 1–3.
                              • The chapter has 40 Rukus and is classified as Medinan.
                              • Hazrat Ibrahim (علیہ السلام) is mentioned 13 times.
                              • The verse 183 describes the obligation of fasting (soam).
                              500

                              How many Rukus in surah Al-Fatiha?

                              Correct Answer: 1
                              Show explanation
                              Explanation

                              surah Al Fatiah Other names: The Key, The Opener

                              surah Al Fatiah No. of verses: 7

                              surah Al Fatiah No. of words: 29

                              surah Al Fatiah No. of letters: 139
